channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Nairobi Boda Boda Rider's Struggle to Care for Special Needs Child
item.description: Kate, a single mother of three in Nairobi, has been riding a boda boda for over a decade to support her family. Her eldest daughter, Winnie, has special needs and requires constant care, which strains...

item.title: Andi Eigenmann Reflects on Her Late Parents' Unseen Legacy in Siargao
item.description: Andi Eigenmann recently expressed her deep sorrow over the fact that her late parents were unable to witness the life she has built in Siargao. The actress, known for her work in Philippine entertainm...

item.title: Filipino Singer-Songwriter ORIGIN Crafts Nostalgic Narratives Through Music
item.description: ORIGIN, a Filipino singer-songwriter based in Hiroshima, Japan, has carved a unique musical identity by blending nostalgia with personal storytelling. His journey began unexpectedly during the pandemi...

item.title: Kwara’s Healthcare Transformation Under Governor AbdulRazaq
item.description: Governor AbdulRahman AbdulRazaq’s administration has transformed Kwara’s healthcare system through investments in infrastructure, modern equipment, and staff training. Over 200 primary healthcare cent...

item.title: Toronto Tempo's Turnover Troubles Cost Them in Loss to Atlanta Dream
item.description: The Toronto Raptors' WNBA team, the Toronto Tempo, suffered a 111-92 loss to the Atlanta Dream on July 18, 2026, due to critical errors in their gameplay. Head coach Sandy Brondello criticized her tea...

item.title: Long-term political violence impacts child safety in nine African nations
item.description: A study of 35,439 young people across nine African countries reveals that long-term exposure to political violence significantly increases risks of emotional, physical, and sexual violence in later li...

item.title: How to Share Pregnancy News Sensitively After a Friend's Miscarriage
item.description: A newly pregnant couple seeks advice on how to share their pregnancy news with a friend who recently experienced a miscarriage. The letter to Eric highlights the emotional complexity of balancing pers...

item.title: Bipartisan agreement on data centres' impact despite political divides
item.description: A new poll reveals a striking bipartisan consensus in the US, with 66% of respondents agreeing that data centres powering artificial intelligence place undue strain on electricity grids, water supplie...

item.title: Delhi HC petition filed over alleged hospital misconduct during hunger strike
item.description: Gitanjali Angmo, wife of activist Sonam Wangchuk, has approached the Delhi High Court to seek his transfer from Safdarjung Hospital, alleging discrepancies in his health reports. Wangchuk, who has bee...

item.title: Conservative Leader Appoints MP to Promote Alberta Unity Ahead of Referendum
item.description: Conservative Leader Pierre Poilievre has appointed Edmonton MP Dane Lloyd to lead the party's pro-unity campaign in Alberta ahead of an upcoming referendum on separatism. The campaign aims to address ...

item.title: Junior Boks secure second consecutive U-20 World Championship title
item.description: South Africa's Junior Boks, the U-20 rugby team, have successfully defended their Junior World Championship title after a hard-fought 16-5 victory over France in Tbilisi. Head coach Kevin Foote praise...

item.title: Drake Bets KSh 194 Million on Argentina to Defeat Spain in World Cup Final
item.description: Canadian rapper Drake has placed a KSh 194 million bet on Argentina to beat Spain in the 2026 FIFA World Cup final, with a potential payout of $5.1 million if Messi's team wins. This wager has reignit...

item.title: Global Trends and Challenges in Economy, Politics, and Society
item.description: The article provides a detailed examination of contemporary global issues, focusing on three key areas: economic development, political dynamics, and societal challenges. It highlights the interconnec...

item.title: Twins' Commonwealth Games Journey Inspired by Mother's Past Struggles
item.description: Georgia and Olivia Nel, twin South African swimmers, are set to compete in the 2026 Commonwealth Games in Glasgow, marking a significant milestone for their family. Their participation is deeply tied ...

item.title: England clinches World Cup bronze with Saka's hat-trick; Mbappé sets new scoring benchmark
item.description: The article details a pivotal moment in the 2026 FIFA World Cup, where England secured third place after a thrilling match against France. Kylian Mbappé made history by becoming the first player to re...

item.title: Raiders hooker Owen Pattie facing suspension as Canberra's finals hopes suffer another setback
item.description: The Canberra Raiders have suffered another significant setback in their push for an NRL finals berth, with hooker Owen Pattie facing suspension following a Match Review Committee charge. Pattie was ci...

item.title: Summer Book Recommendations from Renowned Authors
item.description: The Independent has compiled a list of summer reading recommendations from acclaimed authors, offering a diverse range of genres and styles. Contributors include Helen Fielding, who suggests Joan Didi...

item.title: Zendaya and Elliot Page's casting in The Odyssey sparks controversy over 'woke' casting practices
item.description: The article discusses the controversy surrounding the casting of Zendaya and Elliot Page in the film adaptation of 'The Odyssey,' with critics accusing the casting directors of prioritizing 'woke' age...

item.title: Iran attacks U.S. base in Jordan, killing two troops and injuring several
item.description: The U.S. military confirmed on July 18, 2026, that two troops were killed and one is missing following an Iranian attack on a base in Jordan. The strike, which occurred days after escalating clashes, ...

item.title: Private Sector Demands Review of Controversial Tourism Laws to Resolve Industry Conflicts
item.description: The Nigerian tourism industry is facing regulatory challenges due to overlapping laws from the NIHOTOUR Act and NTDA Act, which have created confusion and disputes among private sector players. The Fe...
